summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Thread Isolation bug fix in OpenClaw Mission Control. CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: Streaming messages no longer leak between threads. All 9 requested test scenarios passed.
passed_tests: Thread Isolation - Streaming: Sent message in Thread A, clicked 'New thread' during streaming. New thread showed NO streaming text or typing indicator - CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED
Thread Isolation - Switch Back: After streaming completed in background, clicked Thread A in Recents. Completed AI response with full markdown (Features, code block) visible
Thread Isolation - Independent Messages: Thread A ('tell me about javascript') and Thread B ('hello from thread B') maintain separate message histories with no contamination
Thread Auto-Routing - Development: Message 'tell me about javascript' auto-assigned to Development space (green banner, green sidebar border)
Thread Auto-Routing - Design: Message 'create a wireframe for the ui design' auto-assigned to Design space (pink banner, pink 'Design' chip in input bar)
Stop Generating: Button visible during streaming, click stops streaming and no complete assistant message is added to thread
New Thread Clears State: Clicking 'New thread' shows empty landing page with 'OpenClaw Mission Control', no messages, model selector shows 'Select model'
Terminal Alias Bridge: /code page Alias button opens setup panel with 'Terminal Alias Bridge' header, 'Quick alias' and 'Bash function' snippets with copy buttons
PWA Manifest: /manifest.json returns valid JSON with name 'OpenClaw Mission Control'
critical_code_review_comments: Thread isolation fix correctly implemented: streamingMessage now tagged with threadId, HomePage filters by activeThreadId, sendMessage uses _addMessageToThread for thread-scoped writes
Persist version bumped to v3 ensures clean state migration
Minor observation: Stop generating button remains visible briefly after click due to async state update timing - functionally correct but could be improved with optimistic UI update
seed_data_creation: None - using mock data from Zustand store with persist version 3 migration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Thread isolation bug fix verified working. Key implementation: (1) streamingMessage includes threadId field, (2) HomePage line ~14 filters: activeStreaming = streamingMessage?.threadId === activeThreadId, (3) sendMessage uses _addMessageToThread which writes to specific thread's messages array, (4) setActiveThread saves/restores without touching streamingMessage. Persist version 3 clears stale localStorage. Auto-routing keywords in ROUTE_KEYWORDS map to space-dev (code/debug/api/javascript etc) and space-design (design/ui/wireframe etc). Terminal alias bridge at /code with data-testid='alias-setup-btn'. All APIs MOCKED in Zustand store.
mocked_apis_note: ALL APIs are MOCKED via Zustand store - no real backend calls. Mocked: sendMessage (simulated streaming ~3s at 10ms/char), executeCommand (simulated terminal), switchModel, all state updates
